steps.t: Amalíbi sent you north-west to the Ordâkhai encampment to obtain sashes from the warriors, and a sounding horn from one of the mustering tents. You ar…
You acquired the sashes and the sounding horn. Return to Amalíbi and show her you have the items.
Amalíbi directed you to the outskirts of the Ordâkhai encampment in the south-east and find the staged attack Amalíbi's forces provided. Place the sas…
With the sashes placed, you should find a spot where you can watch what transpires when you blow the sounding horn.
After blowing the horn, Captain Khârdu recognized the horn as Bosóta's. You need to speak with Bosóta and tell him to explain the tale to plant the se…
The ruse was successful and Bosóta Dôlo played his part well. You should return to Amalíbi and inform her of the success.
